{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Reds/ es gribbu prett
tew/tu famaitadams Kalns/fak-
ka tas KUNGS/ kas tu wiſtu
Semmi famaita/es tad isſteep-
ſchu ſawu Rohkn prett tewim/
nn uowelfchn tewi no taweem
akminaixeem Stipruineem/ un
darrifchu no tewim weenu fade-
Dſinatu Kalnu /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka no tewim ne warr
nedß Stuhru-Akmini / nedß
Gruntes-Akmini neint / jo tu
bubfi par mubſchigu pohstu Wee-
tu/ fatka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Iſzelleet weennu Karrogu
15. tai Semmê/ basuneet ar Basu-
nehm ſtarp teem Paganeemi/ fa-
taifajt prett winnu tohs Paga-
nus/ aizinajeet prett winnu tahs
Walſtibas Araratu/ Meni/ un
Afkenafu/ eezelleet weennu Karra-
Wirfneeku prett winnu / wed-
deet Sirgus augſcham/ ta breef-
migas Wabboles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Satatafajt prett winnu
tohs Pagannus/ tohs Kehniinus
no Meedern Semmes/ winnas
Walditajus/ un wiſſus winnas
Waldneekus/ un wiſſu winnas
Waldischanas Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad drebbehs ta Sem-
me/ un zeetihs Mohkas/ jo ta
KUNGA Dohnas pastahw
prett Babeli/ to Babeleß Sem-
mi par pohſtu Weetu darriht/
ta neweens tur dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Babeleß Warrenee irr
mitteifschees karroht / tee paleek
Stiprumds/ winnu Warra irr
pamirruſi/ tee irr (fà) Seewas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tappuschı/ winnas Mahju-2
tas irr ecedeſinatas / win
Aisſthaujamee irr talausiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Behglis teke Behg-
pretti/ un Webſtnefis Web-
ſcham pretti/ un- ſtabſta / ka
Kehuina no Babeleß Piſſa-
irr uſxemts pa weenu Gall
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ka tahs pahretja-
Weetas irr uſxemtas/ un te-
fari ar Ugguni tadeſinatti /
ka tee Karra-Wihri irr nog-
rufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fatka tas KUD
Zebaoß/ tas Iſraeta Deetvs:
Babeleß Meita irr ta wo
Klohuß / tas irr Laiks wi-
miht: Wehl maſkeniht /
nahks winnat tas pkanja
Laiks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "NebukadRezareß tas &
niasch no Babeleß irr inaunt
rihjis/ winach irr manni fad-
ſiis/ winach irr no mannim
nu tukſchu Trauku darri-
winach irr manni aprihjis
Puhkis/ winach irr ſawu Wel-
ru pildijs ar mannu Gardun
winach irr manni afſdſinuis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Warra/ kas man/
maunai Meeſai irr darrita/
irr us Babelı/ lai fatka ta
dſihwotaja eeſch Ztanag /
maus Affins laid irr pahr te-
Eedſihwotajeem tahs Kalde-
Semmes/ lai fatka Jerusale-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fatka
KUNGS: Redsı/ Es teesa-
tawu Lectu/ un atreebfchu ter
un es likſchu winnas Juheru
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
